Resume Text: RYAN ROSEN
(561) 221 7939 | ryanrosen05@gmail.com|LinkedIn
EDUCATION
University of Florida, Warrington College of Business						                      Gainesville, FL
Bachelor of Science in Finance 							                            Exp. Graduation: May 2027
GPA: 3.47
Awards: Full Florida Bright Futures Scholarship Recipient | Dean’s List (Fall 2024)
Relevant Coursework: Business Finance, Financial Accounting, Managerial Accounting, Statistics, Business Analytics and AI, Marketing, Entrepreneurship, Microeconomics, Calculus, and Excel for Business.
Certifications/Licenses: Microsoft Excel, Word, and PowerPoint Certified | Florida 0214 Life and Variable Contracts License
CORE COMPETENCIES

Financial Analysis | Market & Industry Research | Investment Modeling Fundamentals Portfolio Review & Risk Assessment | Comparative Valuation (Comps) | LBO Concepts & Cash Flow Modeling | Client Communication & Relationship Support | Data Synthesis & Presentation | Excel Financial Modeling | Investment Thesis Development | Asset Allocation Support | Problem Solving & Analytical Reasoning
RELEVANT EXPERIENCE

Wealth Management Intern | Morgan Stanley, Boca Raton FL - Boca Raton, FL   			          May 2025 - Aug 2025
Prepared weekly performance dashboards and exposure summaries for portfolios exceeding $100M, increasing reporting accuracy and turnaround time for the Senior Vice President.
Conducted comparative analysis on equities, municipal bonds, and annuities across 25+ portfolios and surfaced allocation shifts that supported double-digit improvements in risk-adjusted efficiency.
Incorporated internal analyst opinions, market screens, and trend data into investment briefs that were used in client review discussions and portfolio decision making.
Sat in on 20+ client meetings and documented action items covering rebalancing needs, tax considerations, and short-term liquidity requirements.
Life and Variable Contracts Agent (Independent Contractor) | Family First Life - Boca Raton FL              May 2025 - Aug 2025
Ranked as the #1 producer in organization history for monthly annualized premium with > $50K sold.
Built and managed a full client book including prospecting, lead generation, and servicing.
Ran Meta marketing campaigns, handled accounting, and executed all sales operations independently.
Strengthened direct to client communication and sales strategy within a high accountability environment.
Private Equity Case Competition Winner | CHOMP Private Equity Partners (UF Club)			                 Apr 2025
Placed 1st out of 5 teams by building a full LBO model and investment thesis for Dropbox, including revenue analysis, EBITDA margin expansion, CapEx profile, and free cash flow modeling.
Completed comps benchmarking across NTM EV/EBITDA, EV/Sales, and operating metrics, and evaluated leverage capacity using LTM Total Debt to EBITDA analysis.
Identified value creation levers such as pricing optimization, AI driven product expansion, and operational efficiency and presented the investment recommendation to judges, earning a Senior Analyst offer.
LEADERSHIP AND INVOLVEMENT

Senior Analyst | CHOMP Private Equity Partners, University of Florida    				Jan 2025 - Present
Selected as one of four Senior Analysts in the university’s first student run private equity organization.
Oversee analyst members, provide feedback on valuation work, and guide pitch deck development for competitions.
Support the club’s strategic programming and weekly sessions with private equity professionals.
Previous Roles: 
BBYO Jewish Youth Organization |  Chapter President and Head of Recruitment
Varsity Lacrosse | Team Captain

target_roles: Client Service Intern, Sales Intern, Finance Intern
preferred_locations: NYC - 1st choice. South Florida - 2nd choice. Charlotte - 3rd choice. Open to any large metro area on the East Coast.
jobText:
ll gain hands-on exposure to the commercial real estate industry while learning directly from top producers, leaders, and mentors. This immersive internship provides the foundational knowledge, skills, and professional network needed to build a future career in commercial real estate.

Why Matthews™

Your growth and learning is our mission. Every Intern participates in Matthews™ University, our award-winning training program designed to transform motivated individuals into confident, knowledgeable professionals. You will be developed by (and learn directly from) top executives, leaders, and producers, gaining hands-on mentorship, structured training, and collaboration with our industry-leading teams.

At Matthews™, we believe in a culture where success is earned through effort, determination, and integrity. Our interns thrive in an environment that celebrates collaboration, fuels curiosity, and inspires everyone to win together.

Matthews™ has made an industry-leading commitment to technology and innovation. With millions invested in proprietary, AI-driven tools that streamline marketing, client outreach, and data insights, you will gain exposure to the platforms redefining how business is done in commercial real estate.

What You Will Learn

• Participate in the Matthews™ University training program to learn the fundamentals of commercial real estate, professional development, financial underwriting, and sales, as well as brokerage, through the lens of investment sales, leasing, and capital markets.

• Observe and practice marketing and lead generation techniques, including cold calling, research, and client communications.

• Gain foundational understanding of market research, property valuation, and financial underwriting/investment analysis.

• Learn to utilize industry leading AI-driven platforms including client relationship management and marketing tools to manage data and performance insights.

• Participate in ongoing coaching, workshops, and professional development sessions designed to enhance your skills and confidence.

Requirements

• A positive attitude, team orientation, and willingness to learn

• Strong work ethic, discipline, integrity, and resilience

• Excellent organizational and communication skills

• A driven, competitive, and entrepreneurial mindset

• Currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, Real Estate, or related field

• Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and adapt quickly to challenges

• Coachable attitude with a desire for continuous improvement and personal growth

Your Opportunity

• Comprehensive, structured learning through Matthews™ University

• Direct mentorship from Market Leaders, Managing Directors, Executives, and top producers

• Exposure to real client interactions and live deal processes

• Professional development and networking opportunities

Who Should Apply

If you are a motivated self-starter looking to gain hands-on experience in commercial real estate brokerage, business development, or sales, we encourage you to apply. This internship is ideal for students or recent graduates eager to develop their professional skills, expand their network, and explore a rewarding career path in one of the most dynamic industries.
